title: The Buried Giant
author: Kazuo Ishiguro
reason: A profound exploration of memory and forgetting — essential for our literature collection.

title: Under the Udala Trees
author: Chinelo Okparanta
reason: An important Nigerian novel about identity, love, and resilience during and after the Biafran War.

title: The Mushroom at the End of the World
author: Anna Lowenhaupt Tsing
reason: A vital text on ecology, capitalism, and survival in the ruins of industrial civilisation.

title: Sculpture in the Age of Doubt
author: Thomas McEvilley
reason: Critical reading for understanding contemporary sculpture and its philosophical roots.
